messages.subject: [R-sig-Debian] How can I help
messages.body_plain:
Hey Alex,

thanks for your initiative! One thing would be to extend the r2u service 
provided by Dirk to the Debian distribution...

Not a small task, but should be doable, given that it seems to work smoothly 
for Ubuntu...

Cheers

Johannes

Am Dienstag, 18. August 2020, 19:16:10 CEST schrieb 
alexhallam6.28 at tutanota.com:
> Hi all,
> 
> I have been using Debian and R for a couple years. I would like to know how
> I can 'pay it forward'.
> 
> Is there any work to do in the Debian/R space? If so in what ways can I
> volunteer?
> 
> Is becoming a Debian Developer something worth working towards or is there
> help wanted in other areas? 


-- 
Johannes Ranke
07624 8099027
https://jrwb.de
